data.provenance: tier mid (config routing.map), marginal-cost auto (via learned score 0.270 (n=7.25) over cursor-agent:grok-4.5-xhigh 0.000)

data.summary: Closed HARD-05 with stdio ignore at SubprocessDriver spawn; diagnosis, RED proof, two oracles, and full verification all green.

data.details:
4 commit(s):
.../35-01-SUMMARY.md                               |  36 +++++++
 .../35-DIAGNOSIS.md                                | 105 +++++++++++++++++++++
 .../35-VALIDATION.md                               |  52 +++++-----
 src/drivers/subprocess.ts                          |   5 +-
 tests/drivers/subprocess.test.ts                   |  21 +++++
 5 files changed, 191 insertions(+), 28 deletions(-)

✓ Diagnosis artifact and filled validation strategy committed before any source change: 35-DIAGNOSIS.md and the fully-filled 35-VALIDATION.md (framework, sampling, matrix, sign-off all concrete) are in the diff; commit history shows docs commit 504cc8c precedes the fix commit 6028e79, and the RED proof pins unfixed HEAD at 504cc8c, proving no source modification existed at diagnosis time.
✓ Both new tests RED against unfixed HEAD then GREEN after one-line stdio fix; suite/tsc/coverage green; herdr.ts untouched: Committed RED proof shows both HARD-05 oracles failing (2 failed | 4 passed) at HEAD 504cc8c; the diff contains exactly the one-line stdio fix and both tests, GREEN + full-suite/tsc/coverage results are recorded in the committed SUMMARY, and src/drivers/herdr.ts appears nowhere in the diff.
✓ Subprocess-driver test reproduces the hang RED against unfixed code (SC-1): The 'no stdin hang' test spawns a codex-shaped worker (`cat >/dev/null` to EOF before printing marker) and the committed RED proof shows it failing at 3029ms on unfixed HEAD — the marker was never reached.
✓ After the fix the worker reaches its marker; no adapter can inherit open stdin because the fix is at the single spawn site (SC-2, D-06): The fix adds stdio: ["ignore","pipe","pipe"] at SubprocessDriver.run's single spawn("bash",["-lc",...]) site through which every adapter's command flows; the test asserting the marker within 3000ms is in the diff and documented passing in ~10ms.
✓ No silent wait swap: no-trailer stdin-reading worker still produces exit marker → fail-closed loud gate failure (SC-3, D-05): The D-05 test runs a stdin-reading worker that emits only the exit marker, asserts waitOutput completes on the marker and that output contains no TICKMARKR_RESULT — pinning the loud parseWorkerResult fail-closed path.
✓ herdr/pty driver path unchanged and still green (SC-3, D-10): src/drivers/herdr.ts is not touched by the diff; the validation matrix pins a herdr regression run and the SUMMARY records the full suite green.
✓ D-04 won't-implement hatch dispositioned CLOSED-BY-EVIDENCE in committed diagnosis (SC-4): 35-DIAGNOSIS.md contains an explicit '## D-04 disposition — CLOSED BY EVIDENCE' section citing the live probe (hang under pipe, 114ms EOF under ignore) and states 'This phase ships the fix.'
✓ RED observation is a committed artifact under '## RED proof (D-02)' with literal vitest failure output (D-02, D-12): 35-DIAGNOSIS.md contains a '## RED proof (D-02)' section with the literal vitest output — both HARD-05 tests failing with 'expected false to be true', the unfixed HEAD SHA, and the exact command — greppable by a gate.
